name: ctxnest
description: High-performance centralized context engine for agentic workflows. Features surgical section edits, real-time token estimation, and a global git-backed knowledge vault for LLM agents.

CTXNEST_DATA_DIR.description: Absolute path to the directory where your Knowledge Base and SQLite database are stored.

CTXNEST_PROJECT_TOKEN_WARN.description: Token count threshold above which the server issues budget warnings.

CTXNEST_WS_HOST.description: The host the WebSocket server binds to.
